sections.paragraph:
Original: נסה

Transliteration: nâsâh

Phonetic: naw-saw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to test, try, prove, tempt, assay, put to the proof or test
    1. (Piel)
      1. to test, try
      2. to attempt, assay, try
      3. to test, try, prove, tempt

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1373

Part(s) of speech: Verb
